params.reason: artificial fur or articles thereof classified in headings 4304 or 6703 are excluded, except footwear, headgear or parts thereof
worn clothing or other worn articles of heading 6309 are excluded

conditions.value: parts of goods from Chapter 64 or 65

params.note: Clause A: parts of Chapter 64/65 goods route to Chapter 62 if made of Section XI materials; Clause B: Chapter 66 goods remain in Chapter 66 regardless of textile content

conditions.value: clearly identifiable as intended for products in Chapters 61, 62, 64, 65

params.reason: Incompletely made up textile articles, footwear, or headgear that are clearly identifiable as intended for specific products must be classified in those product chapters rather than elsewhere
footwear of textile material without an outer sole glued, sewn or otherwise affixed/applied to the upper is excluded from this section
worn footwear of heading 6309 is excluded from this section
articles of asbestos classified in heading 6812 are excluded from this section/chapter
Orthopaedic footwear, other orthopaedic appliances, and parts thereof are excluded and classified in heading 9021
toy footwear, skating boots with ice or roller skates attached, and protective sportswear of Chapter 95 are excluded from the current section

params.covers: orthopaedic appliances, including crutches, surgical belts and trusses

params.meaning: coverings of flimsy material (for example, paper, sheeting of plastics) without applied soles
params.classificationRule: classified according to their constituent material

params.meaning: excludes pegs, protectors, eyelets, hooks, buckles, ornaments, braid, laces, pompons or other trimmings, buttons or other goods of heading 9606
includes woven fabrics or other textile products with an external layer of rubber or plastics being visible to the naked eye; colour changes are disregarded for this purpose

the constituent material having the greatest external surface area, excluding accessories or reinforcements such as ankle patches, edging, ornamentation, buckles, tabs, eyelet stays or similar attachments

params.term: constituent material of the outer sole
params.meaning: the material having the greatest surface area in contact with the ground, excluding accessories or reinforcements such as spikes, bars, nails, protectors or similar attachments

params.covers: footwear designed for sporting activity with spikes, sprigs, stops, clips, bars or similar attachments

conditions.value: spikes or sprigs or stops or clips or bars

params.covers: skating boots, ski-boots, cross-country ski footwear, snowboard boots, wrestling boots, boxing boots, and cycling shoes
